title: Kid Motorbike Toys,Pull Back Toy Cars Alloy Motorcycles Toys,Friction Powered Kids Toy Cars Automatic Drive for Boys Kids2
features: 【Pull Back Motorcycle Toy】:No batteries needed, just pull it back, then release your hand, toy cars can run a long distance. Toys for 3-8 year old boys, the toys make great fun for party favors and kids play.

【Safe Toys for Kids】:This pull back motorcycle toys are made of high quality ABS plastic and Alloy.High quality rubber wheels,anti-skid,shock resistant,strong grip.It made with genuine rubber tires can effectively reduces the impact force.

【Great Toys for 3-8 Year Old Boys】:Playing with this motorcycle toy can promote the child's hand-eye coordination and sensory perception. The sound of the motorcycle makes children like it, it can become children's playmates when they are young and make them more interested.

【Perfect Gift】:You can choose this beautifully packaged toy car as a birthday gift, Christmas gift, and New Year gift for toddlers. This die-cast toy car set is a great gift and a good choice among your collection of vehicles.

【Multipurpose】:The motorcycle has many functions, not only for children to play with, but also as a gift for motorcycle model collectors. It can also be used as a birthday party gift, cake topper, or car seat toy.
description: Product description Specifications: Type: Pull Back Motorcycles Toy Material: Plastic, Alloy Length: 13.5cm, Width: 7cm, Height: 7.5cm Packing list: 1* Motorcycles Toy This pull back motorcycle is an ideal holiday gift for your children and your friends. Kids can trade with their little folks about these die-cast motorcycle models, keep the feeling of freshness about this amazing toys.
